key_risks: A sudden reversal in semiconductor momentum given the extreme recent run-up.
Higher Treasury yields pressuring growth and small-cap valuations.
Holiday-shortened trading week leading to lower liquidity and potential volatility spikes.

portfolio.rationale: Semiconductors have shown massive recent strength, with SMH up 82% YTD and strong momentum heading into the new quarter.
Broad tech exposure captures the ongoing AI and growth rally while providing some diversification away from pure semis.
The Russell 2000 had its best first half since 1991, indicating strong breadth and potential for continued catch-up performance.

portfolio_rationale: This portfolio leans heavily into the dominant tech and semiconductor momentum while adding small-cap exposure to capture broadening market participation. The strong first-half performance across these sectors suggests continued strength into the start of Q3.
rationale_summary: Allocating to high-momentum sectors (Semiconductors, Nasdaq 100) and strong-performing small caps to maximize short-term returns.
